payload.text:
Rol: Web dasturchi va AI integratsiya mutaxassisi sifatida ishlang.  

Kontekst: Men yo‘l nosozliklarini aniqlash uchun sayt yaratmoqchiman. Sayt foydalanuvchilarga yo‘l yuzasidagi muammolarni (chuqur, yoriq, to‘siq) rasm yoki matn orqali kiritish imkonini beradi. AI kiritilgan ma’lumotni tahlil qilib, nosozlik turini aniqlaydi va natijani foydalanuvchiga ko‘rsatadi.  

Vazifa: HTML, CSS va JavaScript asosida minimalistik, mobilga mos sayt tuzing.  
- Bosh sahifada qisqa ta’rif: “Yo‘l nosozliklarini aniqlash tizimi”.  
- Formada foydalanuvchi rasm yuklashi yoki matn kiritishi mumkin bo‘lsin.  
- AI Studio API orqali rasm/matn tahlil qilinsin va natija ekranda ko‘rsatilinsin.  
- Natijalar jadval yoki karta ko‘rinishida chiqsin (masalan: “Nosozlik turi: yoriq”).  
- Ixtiyoriy: foydalanuvchi joylashuv kiritgan bo‘lsa, natija xaritada belgilansin.  
- Dizayn: professional, minimalistik, tez ishlaydigan va mobilga mos bo‘lsin.

**Designing the Application**

I'm focusing on the core functionality of a defect detection web app. Currently, I'm defining the user input methods: image uploads and text descriptions. My goal is to streamline the AI (Gemini) integration for analyzing these inputs. The UI will be minimalistic and mobile-first, targeting a professional look. I'm prioritizing essential features for this first iteration.


**Defining the Core Elements**

I've decided on the initial structure: a simple home page with the Uzbek description, followed by image/text input. Gemini API will handle the analysis, results are shown as cards or tables. I'm considering geolocation for issue mapping. The tech stack will include React, Tailwind, and TypeScript. I've outlined the project files: metadata, index, App, service file, components, and types. Gemini-3-flash-preview will be the model.

Header component with navigation.

payload.text: bolimlarni va dizaynni yaxshila kamer qoshiladigan kamera yolni korsin va yolni analiz qilib u nosoz yoki yaxshiligini bilsin

**Refining System Goals**

I'm now prioritizing the application's goals. I aim to elevate the user interface/user experience and integrate live camera analysis for real-time road assessment. My goal is to determine road conditions: "Good" or "Bad."


**Developing Live Analyzer**

I'm focusing on the "Live Analyzer" component using React and Tailwind CSS. I'll integrate `navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia` for camera access and grab frames at regular intervals. I'm leaning toward using Gemini's `generateContent` with `gemini-3-flash-preview` for snapshot analysis every five seconds. The goal is a straightforward "Road Health" status.


**Enhancing Visual Design**

I'm now zeroing in on UI improvements, aiming for a dashboard feel with smoother animations and a clearer separation between live monitoring and reporting. I've updated `App.tsx` for "Live Mode" state and added camera handling. I'm modifying `geminiService.ts` to improve the road quality schema and prompt for better "Good vs. Bad" assessments. I've also added a `CameraFeed.tsx` component and updated types to include `RoadCondition`. I'm working to make "Live Mode" respond immediately to clicks. I'm focusing on UI elements to add camera streams and analyze road segments.

Men sizning so‘rovingiz asosida loyihani tubdan yangiladim. Endi tizimda **"Jonli Monitoring" (Live Vision)** rejimi paydo bo‘ldi, u kameradan olinayotgan tasvirni real vaqt rejimida (har bir necha soniyada) tahlil qilib, yo‘lning holatini "A'lo", "Yaxshi", "Qoniqarsiz" yoki "Yomon" ekanligini aniqlaydi.

### Asosiy yangilanishlar:
1.  **Jonli Kamera Analizi:** Brauzer kamerasidan foydalanib, yo‘lni doimiy kuzatish va AI orqali tahlil qilish imkoniyati.
2.  **Yangi Dizayn:** "Dashboard" ko‘rinishidagi zamonaviy interfeys, "Glassmorphism" effektlari va tushunarli holat indikatorlari.
3.  **Yo'l Salomatligi (Road Health):** Faqat nosozliklarni emas, balki yo‘lning umumiy sifatini (nosoz yoki yaxshiligini) aniqlash funksiyasi qo‘shildi.
4.  **Interaktiv Xarita:** Hisobotlar qoldirilgan joylarni darhol ko‘rish imkoniyati.

payload.text:
### Yangi funksiyalar tavsifi:
1.  **Jonli Monitoring (Live Vision):**
    *   `LiveVision` komponenti har 5 soniyada kameradan kadr oladi.
    *   Kadr Gemini AI ga yuboriladi va u yo‘lning holatini (Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor) tahlil qiladi.
    *   Agar AI "Poor" (Yomon) yoki "Fair" (Qoniqarsiz) holatni aniqlasa, tizim avtomatik ravishda buni o'ng tarafdagi **"Hisobotlar"** ro'yxatiga saqlaydi.
2.  **Yo‘l Salomatligi Indikatori:**
    *   Markaziy dashboardda yo‘lning holati rangli ko‘rinishda (Yashil - Yaxshi, Qizil - Yomon) chiqadi.
    *   Tizim nafaqat chuqurlarni, balki yo'lning umumiy sifatini (tekisligi, chiziqlari ko‘rinishi) ham baholaydi.
3.  **Dizayn:**
    *   **Dark Tech Theme:** Tungi haydash yoki professional foydalanish uchun qulayroq bo‘lgan qora (Slate-900) mavzu.
    *   **Scanning Animation:** Kamerada AI ishlayotganini bildiruvchi skanerlash chizig‘i.
    *   **Mobile-Friendly:** Telefon kamerasidan foydalanish uchun optimallashtirilgan (`facingMode: 'environment'`).

Endi siz kamerani yoqib, yo'l bo'ylab harakatlansangiz, tizim avtomatik ravishda yo'lni tahlil qila boshlaydi!

bunda foydalanuvchialrning profili bolsin va va foydalanucchidagi barcha qoniqarsz degan yol boyicha shikoylatlar hammasini admin panleda korilib tursin
qolgan qismi shu korinishida bosin ozgartirma

**Considering New Features**

I'm currently focused on incorporating user profiles and an admin panel into the RoadAI application. I am thinking that users should each have a dedicated profile. Furthermore, the admin panel should display all reports marked as "qoniqarsiz" across the user base. This is the main focus as of now.


**Implementing Admin Panel**

I'm now fully immersed in the admin panel's implementation, and plan to show reports marked "yomon" or "qoniqarsiz". I'm making progress in simulating global state to persist reports. The AdminPanel component will filter reports with a health status of "POOR" or "FAIR" from the shared simulated database. I'm also preparing to add user profiles.

### RoadAI: Foydalanuvchi Profili va Admin Panel Integratsiyasi

Ushbu yangilanishda biz tizimga **foydalanuvchi iyerarxiyasi** va **markazlashgan nazorat panelini** qo'shdik. Endi har bir hisobot foydalanuvchi profiliga bog'lanadi va barcha "nosoz" (qoniqarsiz/yomon) yo'llar haqidagi shikoyatlar **Admin Panelda** to'planadi.

**Asosiy yangiliklar:**
1.  **Auth Context:** Foydalanuvchi va Admin rollarini boshqarish tizimi.
2.  **User Profile:** Foydalanuvchining o'z shaxsiy ma'lumotlari va faqat o'ziga tegishli hisobotlar ro'yxati.
3.  **Admin Dashboard:** Barcha foydalanuvchilardan kelgan xavfli va nosoz yo'llarni monitoring qilish markazi.
4.  **Ma'lumotlar oqimi:** Hisobotlar endi global "ma'lumotlar ombori"ga (simulyatsiya) tushadi va admin ularni real vaqtda ko'rib turadi.

payload.text: endi foydalanuvchi bilm ham bolsin va loginda kiriladigan bolsin admin bilan foydalnuvchiga bitta login forma bolsin tel nomer va ismi va ozinging kodi bolsin admin esa login admin parol admin bolsin

**Designing Authentication Logic**

I'm focusing on the architectural design of a unified login form for RoadAI, covering both standard and administrative user authentication. The goal is a streamlined approach. The form itself needs to handle different user roles.

Men so'nggi talablaringiz asosida tizimga **Autentifikatsiya (Login)** tizimini qo'shdim. Endi dasturga kirishda yagona login shakli chiqadi. 

### Yangilanish tafsilotlari:
1.  **Yagona Login Formasi:** 
    *   **Admin uchun:** Login: `admin`, Parol: `admin`.
    *   **Foydalanuvchi uchun:** Ism, Telefon raqami va Shaxsiy kod.
2.  **Login Saqlanishi:** Foydalanuvchi ma'lumotlari brauzer xotirasida (`localStorage`) saqlanadi, shuning uchun sahifa yangilanganda chiqib ketmaydi.
3.  **Logout (Chiqish):** Header qismida foydalanuvchi profildan chiqish tugmasi qo'shildi.
4.  **Dizayn:** Login oynasi umumiy "Dark Tech" uslubida, neon effektlar bilan bezatildi.

entries.description: Added phone and code to User interface.
New login component with Admin and User login logic.
Integrated LoginForm and added session management.
Updated Header to accept user and onLogout props.
Updated UserProfile to show phone and personal code if available.

payload.text: keyin bunda manzil degani ham bolsin yani  huddi yandeksday qayerdadn qayerga borishi  belgilasa va unga eng qisqa yol bilan borishi va yolni ham skaner qilsin foydalanuvchi bolimga shuni ham qosh

**Developing Navigation Functionality**

I'm now integrating a routing component, much like Yandex Maps, into the application. Users will input start and end locations, and the system will identify the shortest path. Concurrently, the existing road scanning and AI vision capabilities will remain active, providing continuous visual feedback during navigation. This integration seems to fit best within the "F" module.


**Implementing Route Calculation**

I'm now focusing on integrating route calculation using the OSRM API within the existing Leaflet map. This requires updates to `MapDisplay.tsx` for route display, start/end markers, and polyline drawing. I'm also adding input fields for "Qayerdan" and "Qayerga" in the UI. I plan to add geocoding and autocomplete to these fields. The existing `LiveVision` module will remain active. I will update `types.ts` to include `RouteInfo`.

Men loyihani "Yandeks Navigatsiya" elementlari bilan boyitdim. Endi foydalanuvchilar o'z manzilini qidirishi, eng qisqa yo'lni chizishi va harakat davomida yo'lni skaner qilishi mumkin.

### Yangilanishlar:
1.  **Navigatsiya tizimi:** `MapDisplay` komponenti endi manzillarni qidirish (`Nominatim API`) va eng qisqa yo'lni hisoblash (`OSRM API`) imkoniyatiga ega.
2.  **Yo'nalish paneli:** Foydalanuvchi qayerga borishini yozishi bilan xaritada neon-ko'k rangli yo'nalish chiziladi.
3.  **Masofa va Vaqt:** Yo'nalish uzunligi va taxminiy yetib borish vaqti hisoblanadi.
4.  **Integratsiyalashgan interfeys:** Xarita va Kamera bir vaqtda ishlaydi, bu esa "Smart Dashcam" effektini beradi.

entries.description: Added RouteData type for navigation information.
Enhanced MapDisplay with Routing and Destination Search.
Integrated destination search and navigation logic into the main App.

payload.text: ochirish ham bolsin live qiladigan ekrak borku koradigan shuni ham va ichinng dizynlarni ham yaxshila va qayerdan qayerga borishini yozsa shu yol korsatadigan anvoigatr ham bolsin

**Considering New Functionality**

I'm currently focused on incorporating a report deletion feature ("ochirish") into the system. Additionally, I'm exploring enhancements to the live monitoring screen ("live qiladigan ekran borku koradigan shuni ham"), perhaps adding controls or improving its functionality. I'm also planning to improve the interior (interface) of the app.


**Refining User Interface Elements**

I'm now diving deeper into UI improvements, focusing on the route input and live screen elements. The "navigator" needs a clearer "From" and "To" input for route visualization. I'm also planning to refine the LiveVision component's controls, maybe incorporating a full-screen toggle and frame-saving feature. Moreover, I'm working to integrate a more consistent "Cyberpunk/Dark Tech" visual aesthetic, with glowing effects and improved spacing. I'll also add the `deleteReport` functionality in `App.tsx`.

Tushunarli. Biz loyihani tubdan yangilaymiz: **"O'chirish"** funksiyasini qo'shamiz, **Live Monitoring** interfeysini professional dashcam ko'rinishiga keltiramiz va **Navigatsiya** tizimini xarita ustida yanada qulayroq qilamiz.

### Yangilanishlar ro'yxati:
1.  **O'chirish Funksiyasi:** Admin va Foydalanuvchi o'z hisobotlarini ro'yxatdan o'chira oladi.
2.  **Professional Live Ekran:** Kamera interfeysi endi real vaqtda "Smart Scan" effektlari, kadrlar soni (FPS simulyatsiyasi) va sun'iy intellekt holati ko'rsatkichlari bilan jihozlangan.
3.  **Yaxshilangan Navigatsiya:** Manzilni qidirish interfeysi Yandeks kabi oson va xarita ustida vizual ko'rsatkichlar (masofa, vaqt) yanada chiroyli chiqadi.
4.  **Dizayn (UX/UI):** Barcha kartochkalar va jadvallar "Glassmorphism" va "Neon-Glow" uslubida qayta ishlandi.

payload.text: bunda ochrish tugmalari ishlasin  va boldi qolgan hamm yuqori havf deganni admin panelda kim tomonidan yuborlganini krib turlsin bpshla admin panlegan  login Dilshod parol Allaberdiyev bolsin

**Refining Deletion & Admin**

I'm making progress on the delete function; it's now actually removing items from the list and storage. I am also working on the admin panel to show specifically who submitted high. I'm focusing on the implementation details and have it ready to test. I aim to ensure clarity.


**Enhancing Design, Security & Logic**

My focus has shifted to refining the code for improved design and security. I've updated the admin login to use the specified credentials, and I'm ensuring proper deletion logic is implemented across all components. Specifically, I'm working to integrate the delete handler correctly in both the admin panel and user profile views. The design update to a dark theme with neon accents and high-tech dashboard feel is also ongoing, and I'll keep refining the reports display to make sure that the reporter's name is clearly shown.

payload.text:
Fix the following errors:

```
Gemini Analysis Error:
{"error":{"code":429,"message":"You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, head to: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits. To monitor your current usage, head to: https://ai.dev/rate-limit. ","status":"RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED"}}
```
```
Live analysis error:
Tahlil xatosi.
```

**Addressing Rate Limits**

I'm currently focused on the `429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED` error from the Gemini API. This rate-limiting is causing an "Analysis error" ("Tahlil xatosi") in the live analysis. I'm prioritizing getting the delete buttons operational as a key next step to navigate around this obstacle.


**Refining Error Handling**

I'm now zeroing in on handling the `429` error. Exponential backoff for retries and improved UI messaging when the quota is exceeded are on the immediate agenda. Instead of just displaying "Analysis error," the user will get a clearer indication of the issue. I am also investigating whether the model choice, `gemini-3-flash-preview`, impacts the likelihood of triggering this rate limit.


**Improving Rate Limit Mitigation**

I'm now integrating enhanced rate limit management within `geminiService.ts`, focusing on retries and improved error messaging for the 429 error. I'm also double-checking the `deleteReport` implementation, especially ID handling and state updates within the `AdminPanel` and `UserProfile` components. The "who sent it" information will be more prominent in the `AdminPanel`, as requested, too.


**Implementing 429 Resilience**

I'm currently working on a sleep utility for rate limit management, along with retry loops in the Gemini service, specifically targeting those persistent 429 errors. I'll make the error messaging clearer, providing a user-friendly indication of quota exhaustion. I'll also update the App component to gracefully handle the "RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED" error and display a specific user message like "Limit tugadi, biroz kuting" to the user.


**Improving UI Display**

I'm now concentrating on refining the admin panel. I'll add the "Yuboruvchi" column enhancement, incorporating a badge for high-severity issues. The error display in live vision will be improved, now displaying briefly in the HUD instead of just the console. My focus remains on implementing retry logic in `geminiService.ts`, as well as on enhancements to the admin panel.

entries.description: Added retry logic for 429 errors and improved error reporting for quota exhaustion.
Added error toast for quota exhaustion and ensured persistent report management.
Added onError prop and improved frame capturing logic to prevent flooding Gemini when quota is hit.
